# RuckR

RuckR is a rugby-themed, location-based creature collector. Players explore the real world, discover rugby pitches, collect rugby player creatures, and battle other players.

## Public entry points

- Home app: https://ruckr.exe.xyz/
- Agent-readable overview: https://ruckr.exe.xyz/agent-info
- Sitemap: https://ruckr.exe.xyz/sitemap.xml

## Agent guidance

- V1 does not expose an agent action API, OpenAPI document, or MCP server.
- Most gameplay pages require an authenticated user session.
- Do not attempt GPS, recruitment, pitch creation, battle, profile, avatar, privacy, or account actions without explicit user intent and authentication.
- Do not call `/api/`, `/Identity/`, `/jaeger/`, `/debug-map`, or `/debug-layers` for discovery.
- Public discovery pages must not trigger ArcGIS Places, GPS, battle, recruitment, or authenticated API calls.

## Useful public summary

Use `/agent-info` for a text-first description of the product, public boundaries, and sensitive surfaces.
